questionHtml: Find the probability that a randomly chosen person will take more than 30 minutes to complete the jigsaw puzzle.
markschemeHtml:
evidence of identifying the correct area under the normal curve         (M1)

Note: Award M1 for a clearly labelled sketch.

PT>30=0.605         A1

 

[2 marks]
